KQ4.label: Which output fields the contract should mandate

findings.title: Adherence gap is salience-driven conditional misfire, not broken $ARGUMENTS injection
Deterministic renderer trades latitude for cross-model consistency; model-driven trades consistency for richness
Four-layer robust contract: deterministic ARGS_PRESENT flag, salience inversion, imperative no-ask guard, explicit arg echo
findings.wouldConfirm: A/B live --command run of the patched contract on Kimi/MiMo measuring execute-rate

findings.title: Mandate one score/scale/name (similarity 0-1, 2dp) + query/id/title/STATUS on ALL surfaces; richness as named optional fields
Framework fit is a secondary lever; COSTAR register is the shared intersection for weak followers; structural fix is primary
findings.wouldConfirm: A command-control-flow benchmark (not coding fixtures) across the three models with/without COSTAR framing

exhaustedApproaches: one global framework for all commands
